title: notifications-sms — compliance evidence
description: Primary enforcement point for TCPA + CASL + CTIA short-code guidelines. GDPR Art. 6/7 for EU marketing SMS.

controls.principle: express written consent for autodialed marketing SMS
controls.evidence: Marketing categories require consent captured by compliance module. NotificationPreference.enabled + audit trail.
STOP-keyword → SmsOptedOut event within seconds. Cross-channel propagation to preferences.
Automated SendOptOutConfirmation on STOP; HELP handler returns tenant-configured help text.
Marketing SMS refused for CA recipients without express consent.
STOP keyword satisfies unsubscribe mechanism. Auto-confirmation per s.11(3).
Same as mail — opt-in for marketing categories via NotificationPreference.
SMS to minors requires VPC — gated in DispatchGateway before reaching this module.
AnonymiseOptOutsForErasedUser listener — phone → SHA-256 hash on UserErased. Opt-out row retained for TCPA.
Auto-disable on repeated STOP-response patterns (spike detection).
